data.title: Polymarket Launches App With CFTC Green Light in U.S. Return
data.description:
Polymarket, a decentralized prediction market platform, has successfully launched its new application following the green light from the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), marking a significant return to operations in the United States. This development represents a pivotal moment for the platform, as it aims to reestablish its presence in the U.S. market and offer users innovative ways to engage in prediction markets.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/12/03/polymarket-launches-app-with-cftc-green-light-in-u-s-return

data.title: Was the Bitcoin Jump a 'Fake Breakout'?
data.description:
Bitcoin surged on Tuesday but lost momentum. Analysts debate whether the rally will last as markets brace for the Federal Reserve's rate decision next week.
source: https://decrypt.co/350787/was-bitcoin-jump-fake-breakout

data.title: Bitcoin’s strongest trading day since May cues possible rally to $107K
data.description:
Bitcoin posted its strongest daily gain since May as buy-side flows, a sharp adjustment in investor sentiment and a return of the Coinbase premium hint at a potential rally above $100,000.

data.title: YZi Labs fires warning shots at 10X Capital over BNB reserve dispute
data.description:
A bitter governance battle has erupted at CEA Industries, the largest publicly traded BNB treasury company in the United States, which now operates as BNB Network Company (BNC) with the Nasdaq ticker “BNC” after major shareholder YZi Labs issued formal demands to asset manager 10X Capital for what it describes as mismanagement and potential abandonment […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/yzi-labs-10x-capital-bnb-dispute/

data.title: Strategy Floats Possible Bitcoin Sales As MSCI Review Nears Deadline
data.description:
Bitcoin is trading near $92,000, up by about 5% over 24 hours, as attention turns to how index rules and treasury policy could intersect in coming weeks. MSCI has an active consultation on the treatment of companies whose treasuries hold digital assets or whose business models are materially linked to them, with feedback windows running […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/strategy-floats-possible-bitcoin-sales-as-msci-review-nears-deadline/

data.title: OpenAI Foundation Pledges $40.5 Million to Support U.S. Nonprofits
data.description: According to BlockBeats, OpenAI's nonprofit foundation has announced a donation of $40.5 million to 208 nonprofit organizations across the United States. This marks the largest external philanthropic commitment by the artificial intelligence giant to date. The funds are intended to expand opportunities in artificial intelligence, focusing on AI literacy and public understanding, community innovation, and economic opportunities. Despite being OpenAI's largest nonprofit expenditure, the donation is a small fraction compared to the foundation's equity value of approximately $130 billion following a recent corporate restructuring. A recent tax filing revealed that last year, the OpenAI Foundation donated $7.5 million.

data.title: Forward Industries retraces price boost from Galaxy, Jump Crypto-backed DeFi moves
data.description:
Forward Industries, Inc. , a Nasdaq-listed company that took a dramatic strategic shift when it launched its Solana (SOL)-centric digital asset treasury strategy, has announced new products as part of its new DeFi venture. The strategy involved raising $1. 65 billion through a private investment in public equity (PIPE) deal, led by crypto heavyweights Galaxy Digital, Jump […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/forward-industries-retraces-price-boost/

data.title: DOJ Seizes Burma Crypto Scam Domain After Victims Lost Millions in Fake Trading Scheme
data.description:
U. S. authorities have seized the Burmese domain tickmilleas. com, a fraudulent trading site posing as a legitimate crypto platform with fake dashboards and returns to trick victims into sending real money.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/tai-chang-burma-domain-seized-by-us-doj/

data.title: PAXG Transfer from Null Address to Paxos Recorded

data.title: Former SEC Chair Gensler Warns All Cryptos Are Risky — Except Bitcoin
data.description:
Former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler cautioned that cryptocurrencies beyond Bitcoin lack fundamental backing, while Vanguard's dramatic policy reversal granted 50 million clients access to spot crypto ETFs, triggering $1 billion in immediate trading volume.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/former-sec-chair-gensler-warns-all-cryptos-are-risky-except-bitcoin/

data.title: Bitcoin Rebounds Above $92K as Fear Eases and SUI, LINK, 2Z Surge
data.description:
Altcoin Season has stayed constrained while Bitcoin has rebounded above $92,000 and the fear index has improved to 22, as Sui, Chainlink and DoubleZero have posted double-digit gains on new access, steady utility and rotation into mid cap tokens.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/altcoin-season-gasps-as-sui-link-and-2z-push-higher/

data.title: Polymarket Begins U.S. Launch for Waitlisted Users
data.description:

source: https://www.bankless.com/read/news/polymarket-begins-u-s-launch-for-waitlisted-users

data.title: SEC sends warning letters to ETF issuers targeting untamed leverage
data.description:
The United States Securities and Exchange Commission halted several ETF filings that proposed 3-5 times leverage on the underlying asset.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sec-warning-letters-etf-untamed-leverage?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Revolut adds support for Solana’s network
data.description:
Revolut added full support for the Solana network, adding SOL for transfers, as well as withdrawals. Previously, SOL was only available for in-app trading.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/revolut-adds-support-for-solanas-network/

data.title: WhiteBIT’s WBT token included in 5 S&P Dow Jones crypto indices
data.description:
WhiteBIT’s native crypto coin WBT has been added to S&P Dow Jones crypto indices after meeting institutional standards set by the US stock and crypto market tracker, joining exchanges Coinbase and Robinhood. In a post on X, WhiteBIT CEO Volodymyr Nosov announced on Wednesday that WBT is featured in five S&P Dow Jones benchmark families […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/whitebits-wbt-token-included-in-sp-dow-jones/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 93,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.03% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 03, 2025, 18:33 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 93,000 USDT and is now trading at 92,970.398438 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.03% increase in 24 hours.
